mapper.sql: id, scene_id, agent_id, model, temperature, max_tokens, system_prompt, output_format, context_limit, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_scene_agent_config WHERE scene_id = #{sceneId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_scene_agent_config WHERE scene_id = #{sceneId} AND agent_id = #{agentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_scene_agent_config (scene_id, agent_id, model, temperature, max_tokens, system_prompt, output_format, context_limit, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{sceneId}, #{agentId}, #{model, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{temperature, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{maxTokens, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{systemPrompt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outputFormat, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contextLimit, jdbcType=INTEGER}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ai_scene_agent_config WHERE scene_id = #{sceneId} AND agent_id = #{agentId}
